prompt: A high-fashion commercial poster of an adult female soccer fan wearing a haute couture cheerleading outfit infused with soccer elements, such as a national team color-coded short jacket, slim-fit sports skirt, or a sleek modified jersey design. The image combines the aesthetic of a fashion magazine with a sporting event promotion, featuring a mix of warm and cool lighting, high-quality textures, and a high-definition realistic style.
